svg.title: Dependency graph of the workspace packages
svg.desc: The app composition root depends on all eight local packages. app_platform, theme, network and analytics are composed packages with internal dependencies; architecture, config, storage and app_ui are foundation packages with no internal dependencies. Arrows point from a package to the package it depends on.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the app (lib/) composition root wire together from these packages?')
g.text: composition root · depends on all 8 packages

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is inside the app_platform package?')
sendPrompt('What is inside the theme package?')
sendPrompt('What is inside the network package?')
sendPrompt('What is inside the app_ui package?')
sendPrompt('What is inside the analytics package?')
sendPrompt('What is inside the config package?')
sendPrompt('Why is the architecture package pure Dart with no dependencies?')
sendPrompt('What is inside the storage package?')
